name: Bread Alone's Orange Blossom Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 sticks cold butter, cut in pats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter standard muffin tins.
3. Whisk milk, sour cream, and eggs together in a mixing bowl and set aside.
4. In the bowl of an electric mixer fitted with a paddle or using a wooden spoon, combine dry ingredients. Cut in butter until mixture resembles cornmeal.
5. Pour sour cream mixture into butter and flour mixture and mix until dough comes together. Do not overmix.
6. Gently fold orange juice, zest, and orange liqueur into the batter.
7. Using an ice cream scoop, fill muffin cups 3/4 full.
8. Sprinkle tops with a little brown sugar (about 1/2 to 3/4 teaspoon per muffin).
9. Bake in the center of the oven for about 25 minutes.
10. Immediately turn muffins out of tins onto a cooling rack.
